tools_used: CourtListener MCP opinion search and endpoint access
helpful: The provisioned petition and questions-presented text were complete and untruncated.
The statpack supplied paid-petition, circuit, relist, and Term calibration.
CourtListener MCP supplied the controlling Federal Circuit analogue without direct REST access.
gaps: The ranged corpus backend was unavailable because its storage hostname did not resolve, so no similar historical priors were returned.
The government's requested response was not yet due and therefore could not be weighed.
notes: The failed corpus query was not counted as corpus-query use because it returned no priors. The Court-requested response was the most useful case-specific procedural signal.
